case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SHAMSI MAWLAOUI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-28-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: WAIVER OF ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAWLAOUI, SHAMSI $9,364.33 PRINCIPAL, $255.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,619.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MAWLAOUI, SHAMSI DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED NOV-13-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAWLAOUI, SHAMSI
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MAWLAOUI, SHAMSI
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $255.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MAWLAOUI, SHAMSI
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MAWLAOUI, SHAMSI
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCL.
